title: Publication scheme
body: "This is a guide to published information related to our organisation:  Who we are and what we do  Great British Energy - Nuclear (GBE-N) supports the UK’s nuclear industry by providing better opportunities to build and invest.  You can find our contact information on the GBE-N home page  Constitutional and legal governance, roles and responsibilities  GBE-N is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero.  GBE-N Framework Document  Not yet available.  The Framework will set out the broad governance and management framework within which GBE-N will operate and the relationship between GBE-N and Department for Energy Security and Net Zero.  Roles and responsibilities  Read more about GBE-N and our responsibilities  GBE-N Board  GBE-N Organisation chart - not yet available.  Relevant legislation  Energy Act 2023  What we spend and how we spend it  Financial information relating to projected and actual income and expenditure, tendering, procurement and contracts:  Costs  Information on expenditure, including where funding is allocated, is held within our annual report and accounts - not yet available.  Latest spend data - not yet available –  invoices paid, expenses paid to staff, procurement and travel card spend.  GBE-N scales and grading structure - not yet available.  Procurement and tendering procedures  GBE-N Procurement pipeline  - not yet available.  Lists of contract opportunities awards with details of value are available via Contracts Finder  Our priorities and how we are doing  Strategy and performance information, plans, assessments, inspections and reviews:   Business plan – not yet available Annual report and accounts - not yet available   Policies and procedures  Policies and procedures for the provision of services and conduct of business:   Information Request (FOI and EIR) Procedure   Policies and procedures for the recruitment and employment of staff:   Recruitment and selection procedure   Customer service:   Complaints procedure   Records management and personal data policies:   Records Management Policy Subject Access Request procedure Employee, Secondee, Contractor, Privacy Notice Privacy Notice   Lists and registers  Not yet available. "
